title: Malorm family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Malorm family''' was a group of five [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who cultivated a notorious reputation as a family of deranged killers. The family comprised three men—[[Shalla Malorm|Shalla]], [[Rek Malorm|Rek]] and [[Jez Malorm|Jez]]—and two women—[[Sheyna Malorm|Sheyna]] and [[Star Malorm|Star]]. Though the full extent of their sinister exploits remains unknown, they pulled off a successful raid on a [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury spaceliner]] and nearly murdered a high-ranking government bureaucrat. Their life of crime was ended by a team of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] on [[Matra VI]].

==History==
One of the Malorm family's more well-known crimes was their raid on the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury spaceliner]] ''[[Galaxy Wanderer]]''. After hijacking the ''Galaxy Wanderer'' in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], they looted its vaults and [[Spacing/Legends|spaced]] 30 passengers while holding off the forces of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]]. The debacle ended with the Malorms escaping from both the eventual destruction of the ''Galaxy Wanderer'' and the clutches of the law.<ref name="A Guide to the Star Wars Universe">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>

The beginning of the end for the Malorm family started with the appointment of [[Odumin]] as a Corporate Sector Authority [[Territorial Administrator]].<ref name="DB-Odumin">{{DB|character|odumin|Odumin}}</ref> Odumin's tough approach to criminal activities in the Corporate Sector earned him their ire, and they targeted him for [[Death/Legends|death]]. They came closest to killing Odumin when they discovered him [[Spy/Legends|spying]] upon them. However, since the Malorms, like the general public, didn't know what Odumin looked like, the wily [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] deceived them into believing that he was just someone's pet.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>

Upon returning to more familiar surroundings, Odumin assembled a team of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to kill the Malorms. He made a professional gunman named [[Gallandro/Legends|Gallandro]] the leader of the team and promised them a significant amount of money, as well as a general amnesty that would be good in both the Corporate Sector and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as a reward for completion of their objective. Gallandro and the team of mercenaries disguised themselves as a Corporate Sector Authority [[Counterterrorist Security Team]] and lured the Malorms into an ambush on [[Matra VI]], killing them.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" />

Gallandro's success would have unforeseen consequences for him, since Odumin had not been the only being who wanted the Malorm family dead. Some time after their deaths, Gallandro was accosted by a [[Malkite Poisoners|Malkite Poisoner]] who was a member of the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]]. The woman informed Gallandro that his killing of the Malorms meant that she would be unable to fulfill her contract by killing them and that he would suffer the consequences for what he did. Gallandro killed her, an action that began his decade-long feud with the Assassin's Guild.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" />
